name: survey-target
title: Survey Target
description: One or more scopes that describe a target for dwc:Occurrences in an eco:Survey.
examples: `all bird species`; `all bird species except Larus gulls, fulmars and kittiwakes`; `reproductive female Ctenomys sociabilis (only)`; `Oncorhynchus mykiss and Oncorhynchus clarkii (only)`, `all total lengths except < 12 inches`
rdfs:comment: A specification of characteristics of dwc:Occurrences that were included or excluded in an eco:Survey.

fields.name: surveyTarget_pk
fields.title: Survey Target (Primary Key)
fields.description: A unique identifier for an eco:SurveyTarget.
fields.comments: The value in this field MAY be changed in aggregation to guarantee uniqueness.

fields.name: surveyTargetID
fields.title: Survey Target ID
fields.comments: The value in this field MUST be preserved in aggregation. Recommended best practice is to use a globally unique identifier.

fields.name: surveyTargetDescription
fields.title: Survey Target Description
fields.description: A verbatim description of an eco:SurveyTarget.
fields.rdfs:comment: A verbatim description of an eco:SurveyTarget.

fields.name: isSurveyTargetFullyReported
fields.title: Is Survey Target Fully Reported
fields.description: Whether an eco:SurveyTarget can be used to infer absence of detection because all counts of detected dwc:Occurrences matching an eco:SurveyTarget were fully reported.
fields.comments: Recommended best practice is to follow the TDWG Boolean Controlled Vocabulary http://rs.tdwg.org/tag/doc/boolean/. If true (the survey target is fully reported - nothing was left unreported), then this enables inference of absence of detection for everything in that eco:SurveyTarget that is included but that does not appear in the counts (absent counts signify absence of detection).
fields.rdfs:comment: Whether an eco:SurveyTarget can be used to infer absence of detection because all counts of detected dwc:Occurrences matching an eco:SurveyTarget were fully reported.

fields.name: surveyTargetRemarks
fields.title: Survey Target Remarks
fields.description: Comments or notes about an eco:SurveyTarget.
fields.examples: `Survey target scopes reflect post-facto filtering, not original survey design.`
fields.rdfs:comment: Comments or notes about an eco:SurveyTarget.
